hero.h1: Fix your product feed. Increase your Google Shopping performance.
hero.subheadline: Detects feed issues and disapprovals, then positions each SKU on shopper search intents—score, select, assemble—not a plain AI rewrite—so Shopping listings match real queries.
hero.trust_line: No setup. No spreadsheets. No guesswork.

header.title: Fix your product feed. Increase your Google Shopping performance.
header.subtitle: Detects feed issues and disapprovals, then runs search-intent positioning for titles and descriptions—decision layer, not generic rewrite—so products get seen and clicked.

pain_solution.title: Your product feed is silently killing your performance

items.label: Disapprovals
items.text: Products get rejected in Google Merchant — and you don't know why.

items.label: Low CTR
items.text: Your titles don't attract clicks, even when your ads are running.

items.label: Manual work
items.text: You spend hours fixing feeds in spreadsheets instead of growing your business.

pain_solution.solution: Cartozo fixes this automatically — in minutes, not days.

how_it_works.title: How it works
steps: Upload your product feed (CSV or API)
Cartozo detects issues and weak points
Search-intent pipeline: pick winning intents, assemble titles & descriptions
Export ready-to-use feed for Google Merchant

seo_footer.text: Cartozo helps e-commerce businesses improve product feeds and reduce Google Merchant disapprovals using a search-intent decision layer—titles and descriptions are assembled from scored intents, not blind rewrites—with structured data ready for export.
